Index.title: SplitReceipt
Index.description: Upload receipts, extract items with OCR, and split expenses between friends

BuyersStep.title: Who's splitting?
BuyersStep.description: Add the people who will be splitting this receipt. You can always add more later.

UploadStep.title: Upload Receipt
UploadStep.description: Take a photo or upload an image of your receipt. We'll extract the items automatically.
UploadStep.dropText: Drop an image here or click to upload
UploadStep.supportsText: Supports JPG, PNG, and other image formats
UploadStep.errorProcess: Failed to process image. You can try again or enter items manually.

AssignStep.title: Receipt Items
AssignStep.selectItem: Select an item to assign it
AssignStep.clickListItem: Click on an item from the list

instructions.quantity: Indicate how many units each one took:
instructions.custom: Enter the amount for each person:

ReviewStep.title: Review Items
ReviewStep.description: Review and edit the extracted items. Fix any errors from the OCR process.
ReviewStep.noItems: No items yet. Add items manually below.
